title: Update VISION.md directory tree to match actual file names
description: Update VISION.md directory tree (lines 34-57) to match actual codebase structure. Current tree lists files that do not exist (detector/optimizer.js, runtime/llm.js, runtime/memory.js) and omits modules that do exist (engine/ directory, cli/ files, store/, config.js, tunnel.js, runtime adapters). Replace with accurate tree per CR cr-1775850000000 proposed change. See CR for full proposed tree.
